# Green Planet Gardening

> Luxury landscaping company in Paphos, Cyprus. Family-run by three brothers with 10+ years of experience creating bespoke gardens for private villas, resorts, and high-end residences.

## Company

- Name: M.K. Green Planet Gardening and Landscaping Ltd
- Registration: HE402756 (Cyprus Registrar of Companies)
- Location: Paphos, Cyprus
- Director: Marios Knodaritis
- Founded: 2014
- Website: https://greenplanetgardening.eu

## Contact

- Phone: +357 99 245 332
- WhatsApp: +357 96 541 879
- Email: hello@greenplanetgardening.eu
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM

## Services

- Luxury Garden Design & Construction: Bespoke Mediterranean garden design, hardscaping, softscaping, lighting, and irrigation for private villas and resorts across Cyprus.
- Professional Maintenance & Green Management: Ongoing lawn care, pruning, fertilisation, pest management, and seasonal planting programs.
- Tailored Consulting for Architects & Investors: Expert garden planning, plant selection, and landscape strategy for architects, property developers, and real estate investors.

## Service Area

Paphos, Limassol, Nicosia, Larnaca, and all regions of Cyprus. Specialising in Mediterranean and drought-resistant landscaping suited to the Cyprus climate.

## Key Facts

- Family-run business: three brothers (Charalambos, Marios, Angelos Knodaritis) plus strategic advisor Fabio Fornaro
- 10+ years of luxury landscaping experience in Cyprus
- Boutique approach: limited projects per year for maximum quality
- Expertise in Mediterranean, drought-resistant, and water-wise garden design
- Collaboration with architects, builders, and interior designers
- 5-star reviewed by clients
